name: OpenAI
philosophy: An inspired interpretation of OpenAI's design language — the AI-platform-of-record built on near-pure black canvas at top, switching to white below the fold, anchored by the Söhne family at every tier, with a tightly disciplined grid and almost no decorative chrome. The brand reads as the calm, established institution in the AI category: no gradient, no illustration, no emoji — just type, photography, and product chrome.

design_language.motion_signature: Single hero video on loop at low contrast — no other animation. 200ms ease-out on link hovers; product mockup cards fade in over 400ms on scroll.

trademark_signals: Pure black hero band (#000) above a pure white body — the most-recognized OpenAI page-rhythm signature
Söhne at every typographic tier — display 88–128px weight 400 with tight tracking, body 16–18px weight 400 — refuses any other family
Single hero device: a full-bleed photograph (often a person, a research image, or product chrome) inside the black hero band, with the headline overlaid in white
Zero decorative chrome — no gradient, no illustration, no emoji, no inline animation — the page reads as an institution, not a startup
Strict 12-column grid with very wide column gaps — the brand is comfortable with negative space at scale
ai_slop_avoided: Don't introduce a brand color outside the black/white duet. There is no OpenAI green, no OpenAI blue — the brand IS the monochrome
Don't substitute Söhne for Inter or Helvetica. The wide-set Söhne x-height is the brand's typographic signature
Don't paint a hero gradient. The hero is photography on black or pure black with white type — never a color mesh
Don't add emoji. The brand reads as institutional research lab, not consumer product
Don't bold display type to 700. The brand stays at weight 400 across every display tier
